HomePage.title: AI Marketing for Swiss SMEs
HomePage.subtitle: Automate your marketing with AI — for cafés, restaurants, and fitness studios.
HomePage.feature1Desc: Create engaging posts for Instagram and Facebook in seconds — tailored to your business in the right language.
HomePage.feature2Desc: Describe your offer in one sentence. The AI builds a complete landing page with a lead capture form.
HomePage.feature3Desc: Connect your POS (Gastrofix, Lightspeed CH) or booking tool (Eversports) — data flows automatically.
HomePage.pricingSubtitle: No hidden costs. No USD surprises.
HomePage.socialProofEyebrow: Trusted by Swiss cafés, restaurants and studios
HomePage.socialProofFootnote: Early pilot customers — your feedback drives the roadmap.
HomePage.faq1Q: How quickly can I get started?
HomePage.faq1A: Signup, onboarding and your first AI-generated post take under 5 minutes. You just need a business name and a short description of your venue.
HomePage.faq2Q: What does AI usage actually cost?
HomePage.faq2A: Every plan includes a monthly AI budget. All prices on this page and in billing are in CHF — no USD surprises.
HomePage.faq3A: All data is hosted on servers in Switzerland and the EU. We comply with Swiss FADP (revDSG) and GDPR.
HomePage.faq4A: Yes. Monthly contracts, no notice period. You can cancel your subscription from the Billing page yourself.
HomePage.faq5A: Facebook & Instagram (Meta), Gastrofix, Lightspeed CH and Eversports — all connect directly from the app, no IT required.

Legal.contactNote: Questions about this document? Email us: legal@marketing.app
Legal.privacyBody:
MarketingAI CH ("we") processes personal data in compliance with the revised Swiss Federal Act on Data Protection (revFADP) and the EU GDPR.

What data do we process?
— Account information (name, email, company)
— Content you create in the app
— Your leads' contacts (only inside your workspace)
— Technical logs for security and debugging

Where is data stored?
All data is hosted in data centers in Switzerland and the EU. No transfer to third countries without your explicit consent.

Your rights
You can request access, correction, or deletion of your data at any time. Email privacy@marketing.app.

This is a placeholder policy. Have a Swiss data-protection lawyer review before public launch.
Legal.termsBody:
These Terms govern your use of MarketingAI CH.

1. Contract formation
By signing up you enter into a contract with MarketingAI CH. Only these Terms apply.

2. Scope of services
We provide a SaaS marketing-automation platform. Concrete features depend on your chosen plan.

3. Pricing and payment
Prices are stated in CHF (excl. VAT). Billing is monthly via Stripe.

4. Cancellation
You may cancel at any time, effective at the end of the current billing period.

5. Liability
Our liability is limited to intent and gross negligence. No liability for damages caused by AI-generated content.

6. Jurisdiction
Venue is Zurich, Switzerland. Swiss law applies.

This is a placeholder version. Have a Swiss lawyer review before public launch.

AuthPanel.headline: More customers, less effort.
AuthPanel.subhead: The only marketing platform built for Swiss SMEs — cafés, restaurants, and studios. AI posts, landing pages and CRM in one app.
AuthPanel.bullet2: All prices in CHF — no USD surprises
AuthPanel.bullet3: Direct integrations with Gastrofix, Lightspeed CH & Eversports
AuthPanel.quoteText: Since we started using MarketingAI we save two hours a week and our posts perform twice as well.

Integrations.title: Integrations
Integrations.subtitle: Connect your POS or booking platform so AI-generated content uses your latest data.

Brand.title: Brand Kit
Brand.subtitle: Set your brand colors, fonts and tone. Applied to all landing pages.

Overview.subtitle: Here's your marketing at a glance.
Overview.quickPostBody: Let AI draft an Instagram or Facebook post in seconds.
Overview.quickLandingBody: Describe your offer — AI builds the full page with lead form.
Overview.quickContactBody: Manage leads, notes, and AI follow-ups in one place.
Overview.nudgeBody: Start with a social post or a landing page. Contacts land in the CRM automatically when someone fills out the form.

Domains.title: Custom domains
Domains.description: Point your own domain (like cafebern.ch) at your landing pages. HTTPS is handled automatically.
Domains.emptyBody: Your pages currently live at marketing.app/p/…. Add your own domain so customers see your brand in the URL.
Domains.howItWorks1: Add the domain you own (e.g., cafebern.ch).
Domains.howItWorks2: Add the two DNS records we show you at your registrar (Hostpoint, Infomaniak, Cyon…).
Domains.howItWorks3: Click Verify now. We check the TXT record and issue your HTTPS certificate.
Domains.howItWorks4: Once live, your landing pages are reachable at your own domain. Set one as primary to use it in shareable links.

Duplicates.title: Duplicate contacts
Duplicates.subtitle: We found possible duplicates. Pick the "primary" contact in each group — the others will be merged into it, preserving tags, leads, notes, and history.
Duplicates.noneFoundBody: All contacts are unique by email, phone, and name.
Duplicates.mergeHint: Pick the primary contact above. The others will be merged into it and then deleted.
Duplicates.mergeConfirm: {count, plural, one {Merge 1 duplicate into the primary contact?} other {Merge # duplicates into the primary contact?}}
